page.title: Quinfall Item Catalogue
page.description: Weapons, armor, accessories and gathering tools — every piece of gear in the game on a single page, with native names and real stats.

explainer.title: How You Build Your Character
explainer.subtitle: Quinfall uses non-target combat — your weapon shapes your playstyle and your armor weight defines mobility versus survivability.

weapons.title: Weapon Families
weapons.subtitle: Each family drives a distinct playstyle; swap between two equipped weapons mid-fight.

armor.title: Armor Weights
armor.subtitle: Heavy armor turns you into a wall but slows you down; robes feed your mage's mana pool.

explorer.title: Item Browser
explorer.subtitle: Filter, search and compare stats
explorer.noResults: No items match the current filters.

sword.name: One-Handed Sword
sword.body: Quick strikes that combine with a shield for blocks and counter-attacks. The frontline staple.

shield.name: Shield
shield.body: Pairs with one-handed weapons; absorbs incoming physical damage and holds aggro for the group.

twoHandSword.name: Two-Handed Sword
twoHandSword.body: Sweeping cleaves shred packs; single-target burst remains very competitive.

spear.name: Spear
spear.body: Outranges most melee; thrust chains and pushbacks deliver controlled crowd control.

dualAxe.name: Dual Axe
dualAxe.body: Dual-wield speed plus high physical damage; defense pays the price.

dualDagger.name: Dual Dagger
dualDagger.body: Top attack speed, high crit rate and bleed effects melt single targets.

bow.name: Bow
bow.body: Most reliable ranged option for kiting and precision; rewards positioning.

dualCrossbow.name: Dual Crossbow
dualCrossbow.body: Short cast windows mean rapid follow-up shots — perfect for mobile pressure.

arcaneStaff.name: Arcane Staff
arcaneStaff.body: Fire, frost and lightning spells deliver area damage and burst potential.

lifeStaff.name: Life Staff
lifeStaff.body: Group heals, shields and buffs — the survival anchor for any party.

warHammer.name: War Hammer
warHammer.body: Heavy strikes and chain stuns lock down high-value targets.

heavy.name: Heavy Armor
heavy.body: For tanks and frontliners: high physical and magical defense at the cost of movement.

light.name: Light Armor
light.body: Ideal for assassins, archers and spear users: evasion bonuses and freedom of movement.

robe.name: Robe
robe.body: For mages and healers: maximum mana pool and spell-power scaling.

necklace.name: Necklace
necklace.body: Usually carries defense or HP/MP buffs.

bracelet.name: Bracelet
bracelet.body: Provides attack power and crit bonuses.

earring.name: Earring
earring.body: Boosts cast speed or magical power.

ring.name: Ring
ring.body: Wide range of passive bonuses; pairs nicely with set bonuses.

axe.name: Axe
axe.body: Wood chopping — the staple lumberjack tool.

pickaxe.name: Pickaxe
pickaxe.body: Mining — for ore veins and stone deposits.

sickle.name: Sickle
sickle.body: Plant gathering — hemp, herbs and crops.

fishingRod.name: Fishing Rod
fishingRod.body: Fishing — river and sea catches plus rare relics.

huntingKnife.name: Hunting Knife
huntingKnife.body: Skinning game — for fur, leather and meat.

bag.name: Backpack
bag.body: Expands carry capacity; critical for caravans and long farming sessions.
